commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cabab8ba84684b2e041cb272e706d4fff05b13eb)
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates shared generated-media reply prompt text, hides message-tool media compat aliases from the model-facing schema, and adds focused prompt/schema tests.

PR surface: Source -6, Tests +35. Total +29 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source-only for the PR-introduced schema issue: current code advertises upload-file and tests call it with filePath, while the PR removes that model-facing field; I did not run a live generated-media repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer handling is needed because the PR has a compatibility-sensitive schema regression and missing contributor real-behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix: clarify generated media reply prompts
target.body:
## Summary
- move generated-media delivery guidance into the shared system prompt instead of a Discord skill
- tell message-tool-only sessions to pass generated media as message-tool media/attachments
- tell automatic source delivery sessions to emit generated media as own-line MEDIA directives
- keep message media compat aliases accepted at runtime but hide them from the model-facing schema

## Verification
- pnpm test src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- pnpm test src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- git diff --check

## Notes
- Replaces #88436, which was closed because the guidance is shared visible-reply behavior, not Discord-specific skill behavior.
- `pnpm prompt:snapshots:check` was attempted twice but the generator spun at 100% CPU without output for more than three minutes; killed the local validation process. The changed strings are covered by focused system prompt tests.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
